composio_raw.name: Harvest
composio_raw.description: Harvest is a time-tracking and invoicing tool designed for teams and freelancers, helping them log billable hours, manage projects, and streamline payments

llm_raw.description: A time-tracking and project management application that helps businesses track billable hours, manage invoices, and analyze project expenses.
llm_raw.notes: Breadth is high due to comprehensive coverage of projects, timesheets, invoicing, expenses, and user management; auth confirmed via Composio registry.
